title: Google Docs integration to kick off Approvals
excerpt: Google has recently released an Approvals function in Google Docs.  It works very well for the draft document approvals we need and allows approvers to stay in the Google environment with which they are very familiar rat…

posts.author: cbs024 (Courtney Sims)
posts.cookedHtml: Google has recently released an Approvals function in Google Docs. It works very well for the draft document approvals we need and allows approvers to stay in the Google environment with which they are very familiar rather than driving them to a new place and technology (monday) for just approving a Google doc. It would be wonderful to have an integration with Google Docs and the ability to start an Approval on the document from a monday automation. It would also be wonderful if the status in monday could be updated once all of the approvals were received.
